trace:
--- Round 1 ---
<think>The user wants me to classify a judgment document (DOC13) into one of 7 case cause categories:
1. 行政行为 - 行政登记 (Administrative Act - Administrative Registration)
2. 与公司，证券，保险，票据等有关的民事纠纷 (Civil Disputes Related to Companies, Securities, Insurance, Bills, etc.)
3. 执行案由 - 先予执行 (Execution Cause - Advance Execution)
4. 执行案由 - 对下级法院执行异议裁定的复议 (Execution Cause - Review of Execution Objection Ruling)
5. 行政行为 - 行政裁决 (Administrative Act - Administrative Adjudication)
6. 刑事赔偿 (Criminal Compensation)
7. 执行案由 - 其他案由 (Execution Cause - Other Causes)

I need to examine DOC13 (《判决文书13》) to determine its case cause.

Looking at the anchor summaries for DOC13:
- [DOC13_A1] Mentions parties: Beijing XX Guarantee Co., Ltd. (retrial applicant), Shen X (respondent), Beijing Planning and Natural Resources Commission Haidian Branch (first-instance defendant).
- [DOC13_A2] Mentions the case is about "不动产抵押登记" (real estate mortgage registration). The company is dissatisfied with an administrative judgment (2023) Jing 01 Xing Zhong 167. They are applying for retrial regarding the "不动产抵押登记一案" (real estate mortgage registration case).
- [DOC13_A3] Mentions the court reviewed based on "房屋登记办法" (Measures for House Registration), Article 43. It discusses the "不动产抵押反担保合同" (real estate mortgage counter-guarantee contract) being revoked due to fraud, leading to the non-existence of the factual basis for the mortgage registration. The original court revoked the "房屋抵押登记" (house mortgage registration).
- [DOC13_A4] Mentions the court rejected the retrial application based on Administrative Litigation Law.

Key indicators:
- "不动产抵押登记" (Real estate mortgage registration)
- "房屋抵押登记" (House mortgage registration)
- "北京市规划和自然资源委员会海淀分局" (Administrative organ)
- "行政诉讼" (Administrative litigation)
- "撤销涉案房屋抵押登记" (Revoke the house mortgage registration involved)

This is clearly an administrative case involving registration (mortgage registration).
Among the 7 categories, "行政行为 - 行政登记" (Administrative Act - Administrative Registration) fits best.

I need to open at least one anchor to confirm the content and extract verbatim evidence. I'll open DOC13_A2 or DOC13_A3 to get the specific text mentioning the case type/cause. DOC13_A2 mentions "不动产抵押登记一案" explicitly. DOC13_A3 mentions "房屋抵押登记".

Let me start by opening DOC13_A2 to confirm the case nature.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"DOC13_A2","expected_evidence":"Text confirming the case involves administrative litigation regarding real estate mortgage registration"}</search>
<info anchor_id="DOC13_A2">
再审申请人北京某某担保有限公司（以下简称某某担保公司）因不动产抵押登记一案，不服北京市第一中级人民法院(2023)京01行终167号行政判决，向本院申请再审。本院依法组成合议庭对本案进行了审查，现已审查终结。
某某担保公司申请再审称，原审存在超越法定职权、滥用裁量权、混淆基本法律概念、适用法律错误等情形。请求撤销原审判决；指令原审法院对本案予以再审，或者由本院提审。
</info>

--- Round 2 ---
<think>I have opened DOC13_A2 and the content confirms this is an administrative case regarding "不动产抵押登记" (real estate mortgage registration). The key phrases are:
- "因不动产抵押登记一案" (due to a real estate mortgage registration case)
- "不服北京市第一中级人民法院(2023)京01行终167号行政判决" (dissatisfied with the administrative judgment)
- "申请再审" (apply for retrial)

This clearly falls under "行政行为 - 行政登记" (Administrative Act - Administrative Registration) category.

Let me also open DOC13_A3 to get more evidence about the mortgage registration being revoked, which will strengthen the classification.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"DOC13_A3","expected_evidence":"Text about the court's review of the house mortgage registration case and the revocation of the registration"}</search>
<info anchor_id="DOC13_A3">
本院认为，2008年7月1日起施行的《房屋登记办法》第四十三条规定，申请抵押权登记，应当提交登记申请书、申请人的身份证明、房屋所有权证书或者房地产权证书、抵押合同、主债权合同、其他必要材料。本案中，沈某、某某担保公司向北京市规划和自然资源委员会海淀分局（以下简称海淀规自委）提交房屋抵押权设立登记申请表、身份证明材料、第00XXX05号房屋所有权证以及合同编号为CGIG2012字第XXX号不动产抵押反担保合同等材料，申请房屋抵押登记。但根据生效的民事判决，合同编号为CGIG2012字第XXX号不动产抵押反担保合同因某某担保公司与他人对沈某存在恶意欺诈行为已被依法撤销，在此情形下，海淀规自委所作房屋抵押登记的事实依据及核心要件已不存在，原审法院据此撤销涉案房屋抵押登记具有相应的事实根据和法律依据，原审法院结合相关情况就沈某起诉期限的相关认定亦无不当，原审判决并无不当。某某担保公司申请再审缺乏事实根据和法律依据，本院不予支持。
</info>

--- Round 3 ---
<think>I have now opened DOC13_A2 and DOC13_A3, which provide clear evidence about this case.

Key evidence from DOC13_A2:
- "因不动产抵押登记一案" (due to a real estate mortgage registration case)
- "不服北京市第一中级人民法院(2023)京01行终167号行政判决" (dissatisfied with the administrative judgment)

Key evidence from DOC13_A3:
- "申请房屋抵押登记" (apply for house mortgage registration)
- "海淀规自委所作房屋抵押登记的事实依据及核心要件已不存在" (the factual basis and core elements of the house mortgage registration made by Haidian Planning and Natural Resources Commission no longer exist)
- "原审法院据此撤销涉案房屋抵押登记" (the original court revoked the house mortgage registration involved)

This is clearly an administrative case involving "不动产抵押登记" (real estate mortgage registration) and "房屋抵押登记" (house mortgage registration), which falls under "行政行为 - 行政登记" (Administrative Act - Administrative Registration).

I have enough evidence to classify this document. I should stop and provide the answer with the document title.

The document title is《判决文书13》.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"collected all needed evidence to classify this document"}</search>
<answer>['《判决文书13》']</answer>
